questions.title: Что такое Vue Router?
questions.explanation:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Vue Router"},{"type":"text","text":" — это "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"официальный маршрутизатор (router)"},{"type":"text","text":" для Vue.js, который позволяет создавать многостраничное поведение внутри одностраничного приложения (SPA)."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Проще говоря:"}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Vue Router управляет переходами между страницами/экранами внутри Vue-приложения без перезагрузки страницы."}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Это то, что делает ваше Vue-приложение настоящим SPA."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🔥 Что делает Vue Router?"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✔️ 1. Управляет URL в браузере"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Например:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"/home
/users
/users/10
/products?sort=price
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✔️ 2. Связывает URL с компонентами"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Например:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"{
  path: '/users',
  component: UsersPage
}
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✔️ 3. Позволяет создавать навигацию"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Через "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"<router-link>"},{"type":"text","text":":"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<router-link to="/users">Users</router-link>
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✔️ 4. Меняет виды без перезагрузки"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Подставляет компоненты в "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"<router-view>"},{"type":"text","text":":"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<router-view />
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✔️ 5. Управляет историей (history API)"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Можно использовать:"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"history mode (красивые URL)"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"hash mode ("},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/#/users"},{"type":"text","text":")"}]}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✔️ 6. Поддерживает вложенные маршруты"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Например:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"/users
/users/10
/users/10/profile
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✔️ 7. Передаёт параметры"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Например:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"/users/:id
"}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🧪 Минимальный пример Vue Router"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"router/index.js:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from 'vue-router'
import Home from '@/pages/Home.vue'
import About from '@/pages/About.vue'

const routes = [
  { path: '/', component: Home },
  { path: '/about', component: About }
]

export const router = createRouter({
  history: createWebHistory(),
  routes
})
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"main.js:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"import { createApp } from 'vue'
import App from './App.vue'
import { router } from './router'

createApp(App).use(router).mount('#app')
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"App.vue:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"html"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"<router-link to="/">Home</router-link>
<router-link to="/about">About</router-link>

<router-view />
"}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🚀 Возможности Vue Router"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✔ Навигация"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"router.push('/users')"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"router.replace()"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"router.back()"}]}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✔ Динамические маршруты"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"/users/:id"}]}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✔ Получение параметров"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"const route = useRoute()
console.log(route.params.id)
"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✔ Охранники маршрутов (guards)"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"beforeEnter"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"beforeEach"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"beforeRouteLeave"}]}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Используется для авторизации, проверки доступа и т.д."}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✔ Программные переходы"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"router.push({ name: 'product', params: { id: 10 } })"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":3},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✔ Lazy-loading компонентов"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Маршруты загружаются по требованию."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"📌 Итог (идеально для собеседования)"}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Vue Router — это официальный маршрутизатор Vue, который управляет навигацией, URL-адресами, историей, параметрами и отображением страниц в SPA."},{"type":"hardBreak","marks":[{"type":"bold"}]},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Он связывает путь → компонент, поддерживает вложенные маршруты, guards, переходы, lazy-loading и программную навигацию."}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null}}]}

questions.title: Для чего используется роутер в SPA?
Как работает механизм SPA-навигации?
questions.explanation:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Механизм навигации в SPA (Single Page Application) работает "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"URL меняется"},{"type":"text","text":", "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"браузер НЕ перезагружает questions.title: Что такое $router.push?
questions.explanation:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"$router.push"},{"type":"text","text":" — это метод Vue Router, который позволяет "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"программно перейти на другой маршрут"},{"type":"text","text":" (другую “страницу” в SPA) "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"без перезагрузки страницы"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Проще говоря:"}]},{"type":"blockquote","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"$router.push()"},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":" — это способ навигации через JavaScript, а не через "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"<router-link>"},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🔥 Где используется?"}]},{"type":"bulletList","content":[{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"переход на страницу после действия пользователя"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"редирект после логина"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"кнопки типа “Назад”, “Далее”, “Купить”"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"переход по условию"}]}]},{"type":"listItem","content":[{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"навигация из кода, а не из шаблона"}]}]}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"✅ Как использовать в Options API?"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"this.$router.push('/users')
"}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🧩 Программная навигация с объектом"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Можно передать объект:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"this.$router.push({ path: '/users' })
"}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🚀 Навигация по имени маршрута"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Используется чаще всего:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"this.$router.push({ name: 'user', params: { id: 10 } })
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Так надёжнее, чем писать путь руками."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🔥 Навигация с query-параметрами"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"this.$router.push({
  path: '/products',
  query: { sort: 'price', page: 2 }
})
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"URL станет:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"/products?sort=price&page=2
"}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"🎯 Как использовать в Composition API?"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Сначала import:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"import { useRouter } from 'vue-router'

const router = useRouter()
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Затем:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"router.push('/home')
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"или:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"router.push({ name: 'profile', params: { id: 5 } })
"}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"⚠️ Что важно знать для собеседования?"}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"1️⃣ "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"push"},{"type":"text","text":" добавляет запись в историю"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"После push можно нажать Back:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"router.push('/a')
router.push('/b')
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"История: A → B → Back вернёт в A."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"2️⃣ Есть "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"code"}],"text":"$router.replace()"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Он делает то же самое, но "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"не добавляет"},{"type":"text","text":" запись в историю."}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"3️⃣ Переход — асинхронный"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Можно делать:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"await router.push('/login')
"}]},{"type":"horizontalRule"},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"textAlign":null,"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"4️⃣ Ошибка с params без name"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Если передать params без name:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"router.push({ params: { id: 10 } }) // ❌ ошибка
"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Нужно обязательно:"}]},{"type":"codeBlock","attrs":{"language":"js"},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"router.push({ name: 'user', params: { id: 10 } })"}]},{"type":"paragraph","attrs":{"textAlign":null}}]}
